verses.text: Tua hun laitakin Jeroboam' tapa Abijah a ci na hi
Jeroboam in a zi kiangah, “Ding in la, na mel kiselin Jeroboam' zi na hihlam kitheisak kei in la, Shiloh-ah va pai in. Hih mite tungah kumpi ka hihna ding thu a gen kamsangpa Ahijah tua lai-ah om hi
Anlum sawm, moh pawlkhat, khuaizu thawl khat keng in la ama kiangah va pai in. Naupang tungah a piang ding thu amah in nang kiangah hong gen ding hi,” a ci hi
Jeroboam' zi tua bangmahin gamta hi. Amah kithawi-in Shiloh-ah pai a, Ahijah' inn va tung hi. A khanghamna hangin a mitte maang ahih manin Ahijah in khua mu theilo hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Ahijah kiangah, “En in, a tapa tawh kisai nangma kiangah thu a dong dingin Jeroboam' zi hong pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a tapa a ci na hi. Tua bang tua bangin tuanu tungah na gen ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah hong pai ciangin numei dang khatin kineih hi
Ahih hangin Ahijah in amah kongkhak hong tun' a kheging a zak ciangin, “Hong tum in Jeroboam' zi aw, bang hangin midang khat kineih na hi hiam? Nang-a' dingin thugik khat kei tungah hong kipia hi
Pai in la Jeroboam kiangah hih bangin gen in, ‘Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Mite lak panin nang hong liansakin ka mi Israel-te tungah makai-in kong bawl a

David' suante' tung panin kumpi gam balkhia-in nangma tungah kong pia hi. Ahi zongin nang pen ka thupiaknate zui-in, a lungsim khempeuh tawh kei hong zui-in ka muhna-ah a man nate bek a sem ka nasempa David na bang kei a
nangmah in na mai-a om mite khempeuh sangin siatna bawlzaw-in, pai-in pasian dangte leh a kisung milimte nang-a' dingin bawlin ka hehna dingin nong phin a, na nung lamah kei nong paai hi

Tua ahih ciangin en in, mi khat in a bei matengin ek a haltum mah bangin Jeroboam innkuan tungah siatna tungsakin, sal leh sal a hilo mi a kibangin pasal khempeuh Jeroboam innkuan panin ka susia ding a, Israel sungah Jeroboam innkuan ka beisiangsak ding hi

Tua ahih ciangin Jeroboam' mi, khuapi sunga a si mi peuhpeuh uite in ne ding a, gamlakah a si mi peuhpeuh huihlak vasate in ne ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in gen khin hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in a gen hi
“Tua ahih ciangin ding in la na inn-ah ciah in. Na khua na tun' ciangin na tapa si ding hi

Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh ama hangin kapin vui ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel Pasian, Topa' tungah a lungkimhuai na khat Jeroboam' innkuan sung panin ama tungah kimu ahih manin Jeroboam sung panin amah bek mah hanah kivui ding hi
Tua thamloin tuni-in Jeroboam innkuan a beisak ding, Israel-te' tungah kumpi khat Topa in ama-a' dingin khangsak ding hi. Tua huna kipan

tui sunga pumpeeng a kilin' mah bangin Topa in Israel mite vatin amau pute pate tungah a piak hih gam hoih panin Israel zunglot ding a, Eufratis gun galkhatah amaute thehthang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Asherah milimte bawlin Topa a hehna dingin phin uh hi
Tua ciangin ama khialhna leh Israel-te a khialhsakna ahi Jeroboam' khialhna hangin amah in Israel nusia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jeroboam' zi dingin kihemkhia a, Tirzah-ah a ciah hi. Amah inn tungin sangkil a kan laitakin naupang a si hi
Tua ciangin a nasem kamsang Ahijah tung tawnin Topa' thugenna tawh kizui-in Israel mi khempeuh in amah vui-in ama hangin a kap uh hi
Tu-in Jeroboam' gamtatna a omlaite, a galsimna leh a gam uknate, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Jeroboam' uk hun sung kum sawmnihlenih ahi hi. Tua ciangin amah si a, ama tangin a tapa Nadab in a uk hi.

Tu-in Solomon' tapa Rehoboam in Judah-ah uk hi. Gam uk dingin a kipatin Rehoboam kum sawmlilekhat pha a, a min koihna dingin Topa in Israel minam khempeuh sung panin a teelkhiat khuapi Jerusalem-ah amah in kum sawmlesagih sung uk hi. Ama nu a min Naamah hi a, Ammon mi ahi hi
Tua ciangin Judah mite, Topa' muhna-ah a sia gamta uh a, a pu a pate khempeuh uh hih sangin a tamzaw-in amau' khialhnate uh tawh ama hazatna ding piangsak uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amau-a' dingin mualtunga biaknate, biakna songte leh mual sang tung khempeuh leh singniim nuai khempeuhah Asherah milimte bawl uh a
biakna phualte-ah numei-pasal paktat pawlte zong om uh hi. Topa in Israel mite' mai-ah a hawlkhiat minam dangte' gamtatna a kihhuai khempeuh bangin amaute gamta uh hi
Kumpi Rehoboam' kum ngana kumin Jerusalem a sim dingin Egypt kumpi Shishak hong kuanto hi
Amah in Topa' biakinn-a van manphate leh kumpipa' inn-a van manphate lakhia hi. Amah in na khempeuh lakhia hi. Amah in Solomon' bawlsa kham lumte khempeuh zong la hi
Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in tuate' tangin sumngo lumte bawl a, kumpipa' inn kongkhak a cing inncing uliante' khutsungah tuate a ap hi
Topa' biakinn-ah kumpipa a pai simin inncingte in tuate pua-in, tua ciangin inncin'na inndei sungah tuate koihkik zel uh hi
Tu-in Rehoboam' gamtatna a omlaite, leh a sep khempeuh, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Rehoboam leh Jeroboam' kikalah galkidona om tawntung hi
Tua ciangin Rehoboam si a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Ama nu a min Naamah hi a, Ammon mi ahi hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Abijam in a uk hi.
